mapper.select: SELECT compatibility_status FROM post_processing_leduvglitter WHERE cloth_paper_type_id = #{clothPaperTypeId} AND (paper_type IS NULL OR paper_type = '' OR paper_type = #{paperType}) AND ( -- 匹配1: product_model_number（优先级高） (product_model_number = #{productModelNumber} AND product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND product_model_number != '') OR -- 匹配2: product_name（优先级低） (product_name = #{productName} AND product_name IS NOT NULL AND product_name != '') ) ORDER BY -- 优先级排序：越精确的匹配越靠前 CASE WHEN product_model_number = #{productModelNumber} AND product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND product_model_number != '' THEN 1 WHEN product_name = #{productName} AND product_name IS NOT NULL AND product_name != '' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 1

SELECT ppl.id, ppl.product_name, ppl.product_model_number, ppl.cloth_paper_type_id, CONCAT(cpt.category, '.', cpt.type_name) as cloth_paper_type_name, ppl.compatibility_status, ppl.paper_type, ppl.notice_ids, ppl.created_at, ppl.updated_at FROM post_processing_leduvglitter ppl LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON ppl.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id ORDER BY ppl.product_name, ppl.product_model_number, cpt.category, cpt.type_name

SELECT ppl.id, ppl.product_name, ppl.product_model_number, ppl.cloth_paper_type_id, CONCAT(cpt.category, '.', cpt.type_name) as cloth_paper_type_name, ppl.compatibility_status, ppl.paper_type, ppl.notice_ids, ppl.created_at, ppl.updated_at FROM post_processing_leduvglitter ppl LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON ppl.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id ORDER BY ppl.product_name, ppl.product_model_number, cpt.category, cpt.type_name LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_processing_leduvglitter ( product_name, product_model_number, cloth_paper_type_id, compatibility_status, paper_type, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{productModelNumber}, #{clothPaperTypeId}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{paperType}, #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE post_processing_leduvglitter SET product_name = #{productName}, product_model_number = #{productModelNumber}, cloth_paper_type_id = #{clothPaperTypeId}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, paper_type = #{paperType}, notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ppl.id, ppl.product_name, ppl.product_model_number, ppl.cloth_paper_type_id, CONCAT(cpt.category, '.', cpt.type_name) as cloth_paper_type_name, ppl.compatibility_status, ppl.paper_type, ppl.notice_ids, ppl.created_at, ppl.updated_at FROM post_processing_leduvglitter ppl LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON ppl.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id WHERE ppl.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE post_processing_leduvglitter SET compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM post_processing_leduvglitter WHERE product_name IS NOT NULL AND product_name != '' ORDER BY product_name
SELECT DISTINCT product_model_number FROM post_processing_leduvglitter WHERE product_model_number IS NOT NULL AND product_model_number != '' ORDER BY product_model_number
SELECT DISTINCT cloth_paper_type_id FROM post_processing_leduvglitter WHERE cloth_paper_type_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cloth_paper_type_id
SELECT DISTINCT paper_type FROM post_processing_leduvglitter WHERE paper_type IS NOT NULL AND paper_type != '' ORDER BY paper_type
mapper.update: UPDATE post_processing_leduvglitter SET notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
